text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Rhondda and Ogmore Plan Advice Surgeries Better Off Calculator Visiting Westminster Monthly Report News Contact Rhondda and Ogmore Plan Advice Surgeries Better Off Calculator Visiting Westminster Monthly Report News Contact Advice Surgeries If you’d like to attend one of Chris’s regular advice surgeries around Rhondda and Ogmore, please complete the form below. One of the team will contact you with more details. Alternatively, you can call 01443 442521. Would you like to Sign up for Chris's mailing list? Submit Thanks for getting in touch. By pressing the submit button, you agree to opt in. Where you have opted in, Chris Bryant MP and team members may contact you through the communication channels you have chosen. You can opt out of communications from Chris Bryant MP or manage your preferences at any time. To find out how to do this and for more information contact 01443 442521.  Rhondda and Ogmore 9 Compton Road Tonypandy Rhondda CF40 1BE  01443 442521  Parliament Chris Bryant MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA  020 7219 8315 Tweets by @@rhonddabryant 9 Compton Road • Tonypandy • Rhondda • CF40 1BE Get in Touch  Chris.Bryant.MP@Parliament.uk  01443 442521 Visit  9 Compton Road, Tonypandy, Rhondda Cynon Taff, CF40 1BE Follow Me Follow Follow Follow Useful Links = Privacy Policy = Social Media Policy Website by Highstreet Media Pay Monthly Websites
